# isotracker.org

> ISO Tracker is an evidence-based analysis platform for interstellar objects. Track objects like 1I/'Oumuamua, 2I/Borisov, and 3I/ATLAS with real-time sky positions, observation planning, and structured evidence evaluation. Community-driven with 12,000+ observers.

## What ISO Tracker Does

- Live sky tracking of interstellar objects with positions updated every minute
- Observation planning with custom alerts for optimal viewing from your location
- Evidence framework for scientifically evaluating claims about interstellar objects
- Community voting and debate on evidence quality and interpretation
- Tracks chain of custody, witness credibility, and technical analysis for each piece of evidence

## Key Features

### Live Sky Tracking
Real-time positions of known interstellar objects crossing the solar system.

### Evidence Framework
A structured three-step approach: assess evidence quality, cast your verdict, track evolving consensus vs scientific consensus over time.

### Community
12,000+ observers analysing evidence together. Cast your vote: natural or anomalous?

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://isotracker.org/): Overview and latest data
- [Dashboard](https://isotracker.org/dashboard): Live tracking dashboard
- [ISO Objects](https://isotracker.org/iso-objects): Catalogue of interstellar objects

## Built By

Jamie Watters. Open source project.
- Source: https://github.com/TheWayWithin/iso-tracker
